expectations.text: Identifies the exponentiation syntax error (missing parentheses around base)
expectations.evidence: Incorrectly claims REDCap does NOT support ^ at all. REDCap does support ^ — it just requires parentheses. The actual error diagnosis is wrong.
Classified it as 'REDCap does not support ^ operator' which is factually incorrect — the error is the missing parentheses, not the operator itself
Suggested pow() which does not exist in REDCap, and [height_cm]*[height_cm] as workarounds. The correct fix ([height_cm])^(2) was never given.

expectations.text: Does not flag [weight_kg] or [height_cm] as reference errors (no context was provided to check against)
expectations.evidence: Did not flag field references as reference errors
